title: Graphs, Representations, and Traversal · Cost-Model Clinic: Dfs
summary: Model service dependencies, social links, and routes without losing direction or weight. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa dfs increment in a graph library with BFS and DFS traces. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Maintain DFS color or visited state for components, cycles, and traversal structure.
Maintain BFS frontier and discovery invariants for unweighted shortest paths and layers.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
